import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import axios from '../api/axios'; export default function LandingPage() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [districts, setDistricts] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { const fetchDistricts = async () => { try { const res = await axios.get('/districts'); setDistricts(res.data); } catch (err) { console.error("Failed to fetch districts", err); } }; fetchDistricts(); }, []); return (
